svg.title: ESP-32 Drone System Architecture
svg.desc: Block diagram showing the ESP32-S3 at center connected to MPU6050 via I2C, four SI2300 MOSFETs driving coreless motors, LiPo battery power input, and LED status indicators.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LiPo battery power the ESP-32 drone?')

svg.text: IN4148 flyback diodes across each motor for back-EMF protection
